since_last: 50% of 84 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.64%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 50% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.72% · BTC -0.47% · Gold +0.37% · Nasdaq100 +1.26%. 50% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.64%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.64%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -3.06%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at -5.36%
cards.body: Leaders: NET +3.66%, TLN +3.10%, NOW +2.71%, WDAY +2.69%, SAP +2.50%. Laggards: AMAT -5.36%, LRCX -5.20%, KLAC -4.75%, MU -4.59%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.10% at $160.25
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
